# Release Promotion Decision Packet v1 Fixtures

This directory is reserved for deterministic offline fixtures used by `ppd/tests/test_release_promotion_decision_packet_v1.py`.

Fixtures in this directory must not include private DevHub session state, browser traces, screenshots, HAR files, raw crawl bodies, PDFs, downloaded documents, or artifacts that mutate PP&D source, document, requirement, process, guardrail, prompt, release-state, fixture, or agent-state data.
